## Submission Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The server is a valid MCP server with a public GitHub repository
- [ ] `git_url` points to the canonical GitHub repo (not a fork)
- [ ] `author_github` matches the GitHub username or organization that owns the repo
- [ ] The JSON file passes schema validation (`check-jsonschema --schemafile schemas/server.schema.json <file>`)
- [ ] The file is placed in the correct category directory (`servers/<category>/<name>.json`)
- [ ] I have verified the `git_url` responds with HTTP 200

## Server Details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Name | <!-- e.g. My MCP Server --> |
| Category | <!-- e.g. developer-tools --> |
| GitHub | <!-- e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo --> |
